display.name: Woundvine Altar
display.short_description: An altar stone has nearly disappeared under woundvine roots. Clear sap beads along one side while darker resin clots around a cup of cracked bone.

choices.label: Bind with the clear sap
choices.summary: Use the pale resin like a bandage and seal what the road has opened before the bitter vines reach it.

choices.label: Cut the bitter vines free
choices.summary: Take the harsher resin instead, learn how the altar fed itself, and trust the lesson to pay off later.
